data.description: TradePath is your AI-powered trading journal that analyzes your behavior, mindset, and strategies to deliver personalized insights and eliminate costly habits. Turn your trading data into a growth engine today.
data.html:

Get Started
Contact us

Early access: Session Buddy is LIVE! (beta)

HomeFeaturesPricingBrokersBlogsContact Us
Start Free
Login

Record. Trade. Improve.

The first AI note-taker for traders. Session Buddy watches you trade, captures your thought process, and shows you exactly what's working. Journaling that finally makes sense.

LOGIN

Session Buddy Features

Session Recording

Every trading session is packed with information: price action, volume, news, your own reactions. By the time you sit down to journal, most of it is gone. Session Buddy records your screen and voice the entire time you trade, creating a complete record you can review, search, and learn from.

Session Voice-Activated Journaling

The best traders think out loud. Session Buddy listens. Explain why you're entering a trade, what you're seeing, why you're hesitating. The AI captures it all and connects it to your actual trades. Now you can review not just what you did, but why you did it.

Automatic Execution Recognition

Session Buddy uses machine learning to read your TradingView screen in real-time. It recognizes when you place a stop order, when you get filled, when you move your stop, when you exit. Every execution is logged automatically, no broker connection needed, no manual entry required.

Trading moves fast. YOU can't keep up.

Session Buddy shows you exactly where you mess up, so you can stop repeating it.

Start Recording Free -

Broker Sync

Session Buddy works with any platform. If you're not on TradingView, just record your session and sync your broker when you're done. Your voice notes get matched with your actual trades, giving you a complete picture of every session.

AI Session Analysis

When you stop recording, Session Buddy's AI goes to work. It analyzes your session and delivers a summary: what you did well, what mistakes you made, and patterns it noticed. Did you break your rules? Did you hesitate on good setups? Did you overtrade? You'll know in seconds, not hours.

Statistics Dashboard

Session Buddy tracks everything: your win rate, your risk-to-reward ratio, which setups are profitable, which times of day work best for you, which strategies are actually making you money. Stop guessing if you should trade mornings or afternoons. The data will tell you.

Rule Tracking

Every trader has rules. 'Don't trade the first 15 minutes.' 'Always take partials at 2R.' 'No revenge trading.' But are you actually following them? Session Buddy tracks your rules against your actions and shows you exactly how often you stick to your plan, and what it costs you when you don't.

AI Chat Assistant

'Where do I need to improve?' 'What's my most profitable setup?' 'Why do I keep losing on Fridays?' Ask Session Buddy anything about your trading, and it'll answer based on your actual data. Not generic advice: personalized insights from your own history.

10 Tips to Stop Emotional Trading for Greater Trading Success

Emotional trading is one of the main reasons most traders lose money in the financial markets. Fear, greed, frustration, excitement, and stress can push a trader to ignore the trading plan and make poor decisions.

Breakout trading is one of the most exciting and effective ways to capture strong market moves

Read More

Emotional Control in Trading: Mastering Your Mind for Trading Success

Emotional control in trading is one of the most important skills a trader can develop. This is because it influences how you make trading decisions, how you respond to losing trades, and how consistent your trading strategy becomes over time.
